description: Improve the side panel UI layout, alignment, spacing, typography, and visual consistency to achieve a polished, production-grade neobrutalist aesthetic.

userStories.title: Add dark mode detection and Space Mono font
userStories.description: As a user, I want the side panel to respect my OS dark mode preference and use the correct monospace font so the retro aesthetic is complete.
acceptanceCriteria: side-panel.html loads Space Mono from Google Fonts alongside Archivo Black and Space Grotesk
styles.css defines --font-mono: 'Space Mono', monospace in the @theme block
A <script> block in side-panel.html (before the stylesheet) adds class 'dark' to <html> when prefers-color-scheme: dark matches, and listens for changes
The <code> element in EmptyStates.tsx uses font-mono class (which maps to Space Mono)
userStories.notes: File: platform/browser-extension/side-panel/side-panel.html — add Space Mono to the Google Fonts link: &family=Space+Mono:wght@400;700. Add inline <script> before stylesheet: (function(){const m=window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme:dark)');function a(e){document.documentElement.classList.toggle('dark',e.matches)}a(m);m.addEventListener('change',a)})(). File: platform/browser-extension/src/side-panel/styles.css — add --font-mono: 'Space Mono', monospace; after --font-sans line in @theme block. File: platform/browser-extension/src/side-panel/components/EmptyStates.tsx line 14 — change <code className="border-border bg-muted rounded border-2 px-3 py-2 text-sm"> to include font-mono.

userStories.title: Fix header shadow and tighten padding
userStories.description: As a user, I want the header to feel clean and not have competing visual elements (shadow + border) so the top bar is crisp.
acceptanceCriteria: Header.tsx header element has no shadow class (remove shadow-sm)
Header.tsx uses py-2.5 instead of py-3 for a tighter header
Header.tsx h1 uses text-sm instead of text-base for better proportion in side panel
userStories.notes: File: platform/browser-extension/src/side-panel/components/Header.tsx line 5. Current: 'border-border bg-background flex items-center justify-between border-b-2 px-4 py-3 shadow-sm'. Change to: 'border-border bg-background flex items-center justify-between border-b-2 px-4 py-2.5'. Line 8: change text-base to text-sm.

userStories.title: Fix plugin card trigger vertical alignment
userStories.description: As a user, I want the plugin icon, name, and chevron in the accordion header to be vertically centered on the same line.
acceptanceCriteria: PluginCard.tsx AccordionPrimitive.Trigger uses items-center instead of items-start
The plugin display name, icon, and chevron visually center-align in the accordion header row
userStories.notes: File: platform/browser-extension/src/side-panel/components/PluginCard.tsx line 106. Change items-start to items-center. The icon is 32px, the text line-height is ~20px, chevron is 16px — items-start top-aligns them which looks off. items-center properly centers all three.

userStories.title: Tighten tool row density and soften hover
userStories.description: As a user, I want the tool list to be compact and scannable, with a subtle hover state that doesn't blast bright yellow across the row.
acceptanceCriteria: ToolRow.tsx uses py-1.5 instead of py-2 for tighter vertical density
ToolRow.tsx uses hover:bg-muted/50 instead of hover:bg-accent for a softer hover
ToolRow.tsx uses border-b instead of border-b-2 for lighter row separators
userStories.notes: File: platform/browser-extension/src/side-panel/components/ToolRow.tsx line 20. Current className: 'border-border hover:bg-accent flex items-center gap-2 border-b-2 px-3 py-2 transition-colors last:border-b-0 ...'. Change hover:bg-accent to hover:bg-muted/50, border-b-2 to border-b, py-2 to py-1.5.

userStories.title: Improve tool description readability
userStories.description: As a user, I want tool descriptions to be readable at a comfortable size with appropriate font weight.
acceptanceCriteria: ToolRow.tsx description text uses text-[13px] instead of text-xs (12px) for better readability
ToolRow.tsx description text uses font-normal instead of font-medium for less visual heaviness
userStories.notes: File: platform/browser-extension/src/side-panel/components/ToolRow.tsx line 26. Current: 'text-foreground truncate text-xs font-medium'. Change to: 'text-foreground truncate text-[13px]'. Remove font-medium (font-normal is default). The 13px size splits the difference between text-xs (12px) and text-sm (14px) — readable but compact.

userStories.title: Reduce search input shadow weight
userStories.description: As a user, I want the search input to feel lightweight in the panel layout, not competing with the accordion cards below.
acceptanceCriteria: The search Input in App.tsx passes a className that includes shadow-xs to override the default shadow-md
The search input visually has a 1px offset shadow instead of a 4px offset shadow
userStories.notes: File: platform/browser-extension/src/side-panel/App.tsx line 208. Current className: 'pr-8 pl-9'. Change to: 'pr-8 pl-9 shadow-xs'. Tailwind merge will override the shadow-md from the Input component's base styles with shadow-xs.

userStories.title: Polish footer and remove redundant branding
userStories.description: As a user, I want the footer to feel lighter and show useful info instead of repeating the app name.
acceptanceCriteria: Footer.tsx uses border-t (1px) instead of border-t-2 (2px)
Footer.tsx uses py-1.5 instead of py-2 for a slimmer footer
Footer.tsx left side shows tool count or 'OpenTabs' — keeping OpenTabs is acceptable if changing requires prop threading
userStories.notes: File: platform/browser-extension/src/side-panel/components/Footer.tsx line 2. Current: 'border-border bg-background text-muted-foreground flex items-center justify-between border-t-2 px-4 py-2 text-xs'. Change border-t-2 to border-t and py-2 to py-1.5. The footer should feel like a whisper, not a shout — lighter border and tighter padding achieve this.

userStories.title: Enlarge empty state icons for better visual weight
userStories.description: As a user, I want the empty state illustrations to have more visual presence so the panel doesn't feel sparse when no plugins are loaded.
acceptanceCriteria: EmptyStates.tsx DisconnectedState icon uses h-12 w-12 instead of h-10 w-10
EmptyStates.tsx EmptyState icon uses h-12 w-12 instead of h-10 w-10
Empty state icons have text-muted-foreground color for a softer look
userStories.notes: File: platform/browser-extension/src/side-panel/components/EmptyStates.tsx. Line 9: change 'h-10 w-10' to 'h-12 w-12 text-muted-foreground'. Line 32: change 'h-10 w-10' to 'h-12 w-12 text-muted-foreground'. The icons are currently small relative to the bordered card — 48px icons (h-12) fill the space better than 40px (h-10).

userStories.title: Add rounded container to ToolIcon for visual consistency with PluginIcon
userStories.description: As a user, I want tool icons to have the same container style as plugin icons (just smaller) for visual rhythm in the UI.
acceptanceCriteria: ToolIcon.tsx wraps the Wrench icon in a small rounded container div with bg-muted/50 border border-border
The container is 24px x 24px (h-6 w-6) with the Wrench icon at h-3 w-3 inside it
The container uses rounded and flex items-center justify-center
userStories.notes:
File: platform/browser-extension/src/side-panel/components/ToolIcon.tsx. Replace the bare with:
. This creates a consistent icon-in-container pattern matching PluginIcon but at 24px instead of 32px.

userStories.title: Replace magic number indent in TabStateHint with consistent spacing
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the TabStateHint text to use a reliable indentation method instead of a fragile magic pixel value.
acceptanceCriteria: TabStateHint in PluginCard.tsx uses ml-[44px] (32px icon + 12px gap) instead of pl-[42px] for the indent
The hint text aligns with the plugin display name above it
userStories.notes: File: platform/browser-extension/src/side-panel/components/PluginCard.tsx. Lines 31 and 37 — change pl-[42px] to ml-[44px]. The trigger row has px-3 (12px) + 32px icon + gap-2 (8px) = 52px to the text start. But TabStateHint is outside the trigger, positioned at px-3 (12px) + pl-[42px] = 54px. With ml-[44px] and keeping px-3: 12px + 44px = 56px. Actually the correct calc: trigger has px-3 (12px start) + icon 32px + gap-2 (8px) = text starts at 52px. So the hint should use pl-[52px] and no px-3. OR simpler: keep px-3 and use pl-[40px] to get 12+40=52. Let's use px-3 pl-10 (pl-10 = 40px, total = 52px from left edge).
